meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jonet verch Rhys was born in 1218, in Is Cennen, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Rhys ap Gronwy, was 28 and her mother, Nest verch Dafydd Fras, was 15. She had at least 3 sons with Gruffudd ap Maredudd Gethin.

ja.lifeSummary: Jonet verch Rhysが1218年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアイス センで生まれた時，父Rhys ap Gronwyは28歳，母Nest verch Dafydd Frasは15歳であった。彼女はGruffudd ap Maredudd Gethinとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Jonet verch Rhys(이)가 1218년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 이스 세넨에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rhys ap Gronwy(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Nest verch Dafydd Fras(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 Gruffudd ap Maredudd Gethin(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jonet verch Rhys родилась в 1218 г. в местности ис кеннен, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Rhys ap Gronwy было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Nest verch Dafydd Fras, 15. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына от Gruffudd ap Maredudd Gethin.
